title: Brittonastrum lanceolatum
taxonomy: Brittonastrum lanceolatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The classification of Brittonastrum lanceolatum includes being a member of the genus Brittonastrum, which is a group of flowering plants. Within the family Polemoniaceae, Brittonastrum lanceolatum is part of the order Ericales. Additionally, at the kingdom level, Brittonastrum lanceolatum falls under the kingdom Plantae.
